cards.back: A game where two prisoners must decide whether to confess or remain silent, resulting in a Nash equilibrium where both prisoners confess, despite both being better off if they remain silent.
A game where two people must choose between two options, resulting in a Nash equilibrium where both choose the option that is least preferred by the other person.
A game where players must choose whether to sacrifice a small amount to block a larger amount, resulting in a Nash equilibrium where each player sacrifices the smallest amount.
A game where two hunters must decide whether to hunt together or separately, resulting in a Nash equilibrium where each hunter hunts alone, despite both being better off if they hunt together.

A game where two workers must decide whether to work together to reduce the cost of extracting coal or to cut costs by not working together, resulting in a Nash equilibrium where both workers choose not to work together.
